species: identified S878 as the major residue that is O-GlcNAcylated on human DNMT1.
tissue: we examined liver samples from C57BL/6J mice fed an obesogenic high-fat/high-sucrose (HF/HS) diet for 16 wk.
cell_type: we found that DNMT1 is O-GlcNAcylated in HepG2 cells (Figure 1—figure supplement 2) and B-cell-derived lymphocytes...
disease_state: implicates a role for glycosylation of DNMT1 in metabolic diseases characterized by hyperglycemia.
